title: Calculate Directory Size with Python
summary: Recursively calculate total byte size and counts for files and subdirectories in a directory tree.
highlights: Recursively sums file sizes across a directory tree
Includes hidden files and hidden directories in the totals
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9 on macOS. Verified behavior includes recursive size accumulation, hidden path inclusion, normalized absolute root paths, root symlink rejection, nested symlink skipping, walk error propagation, and subdirectory counting that excludes the root directory.
